steps.action: Open or select GitHub issue with full requirements template
steps.automatedBy: lib/task-platform/factory-intake.js writeIntakeEvidence (githubIssueUrl on factory queue item)

steps.action: Copy issue requirements into engineering-team intake draft
PM refines title, acceptance criteria, priority, task type
Architect adds technical spec, tier, monitoring spec
Create pilot Project and link single task
Record execution contract with forge_dispatch targetRepo
Run bounded projection catch-up after each production write
Approve execution contract (policy or explicit operator)
Seed task for forge-execution-readiness or verify existing seed
Start local forgeadapter + upstream mocks (or production forge host)
POST forgeadapter /tasks/:id/start
Seed pilot AI-agent roster
Run OpenClaw live delegation smoke
steps.automatedBy: scripts/verify-gp-013-delegation-smoke.js (npm run golden-path:smoke:gp-013; use --openclaw-url for live proof)

steps.action: Engineer implements change (branch, commits, PR)
QA records initial fail (intentional on first pass for golden path)
Forge review gate rejected or revision_required path
Engineer fixes findings and pushes new commit
POST forgeadapter /tasks/:id/resume after QA fail
QA records retest pass with prior_run_id scope
Approve forgeadapter qa/architect/pm review gates
ET close review — PM + Architect approve
Merge PR after required GitHub checks
Local deploy validation (lint, test:unit, standards:check)
Provision/use Supabase Postgres for target app (if not platform-only)
Provision Redis (if required by target app)
SRE monitoring approval and 48h window
Task closeout report with manual-action classification
